'''Havor''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]], he and his copilot [[Merglyn]] were killed above [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]] by the [[Kiffu Guardians]], due to a faulty [[Deflector shield generator/Legends|shield generator]] sold to them by [[Watto/Legends|Watto]], while attempting to smuggle [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] to that [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Unbeknownst to Havor, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Aayla Secura/Legends|Aayla Secura]] had stowed away in the cargo hold in order to pursue [[Volfe Karkko]].
